---
name: Internal SDLC review
about: Review whether the project process is helping the repository meet its goals
title: "[internal-review] "
labels: ["needs-triage", "artifact:governance"]
assignees: []
---

## Review period

What period or release does this review cover?

## What is working

Which parts of the current SDLC, review flow, or automation are helping?

## What is creating drag

Which steps are slowing progress, creating confusion, or failing to reduce risk?

## Evidence

Reference incidents, PRs, missed reviews, contributor confusion, or release friction.

## Recommended changes

List concrete process changes, automation, or documentation follow-ups.

## Follow-up issues

Link or list the issues that should be created from this review.
